hero.description: Nine integrated platforms. One unified ecosystem. Purpose-built for the modern era of healthcare, government, and enterprise operations.

products.title: The CyberCom Ecosystem
products.subtitle: Nine integrated platforms that power the digital transformation of healthcare, government, and enterprise.

cymed.name: CyMed
cymed.description: FHIR-native, ICD-11 ready clinical platform covering the complete healthcare continuum.

cycom.name: CyCom
cycom.description: Unified ERP covering finance, HR, procurement, manufacturing, and CRM.

cygov.name: CyGov
cygov.description: Digital transformation for citizen services, national registries, and government workflows.

cyidentity.name: CyIdentity
cyidentity.description: OAuth 2.1, OIDC, passkeys, SSO, RBAC/ABAC, and Zero Trust security.

cyintegrationhub.name: CyIntegrationHub
cyintegrationhub.description: FHIR, HL7, DICOM, REST, Kafka, EDI, SOAP, LDAP, and SFTP integration fabric.

cyai.name: CyAI
cyai.description: Clinical AI, government AI, predictive analytics, and enterprise intelligence.

cydata.name: CyData
cydata.description: Lakehouse architecture, BI, data governance, and population health analytics.

cyconnect.name: CyConnect
cyconnect.description: Unified messaging, notifications, communications, and collaboration.

cycitizen.name: CyCitizen
cycitizen.description: Citizen portal, digital wallet, government services, and national identity.

industries.title: Built for Your Industry
industries.subtitle: Deep domain expertise across the sectors that matter most.

healthcare.name: Healthcare
healthcare.description: End-to-end clinical platform for hospitals, clinics, labs, and pharmacies.

government.name: Government
government.description: Digital government platforms for citizen services and national programs.

retail.name: Retail & Commerce
retail.description: Unified commerce, inventory, and customer experience platforms.

manufacturing.name: Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Production, quality, and supply chain management platforms.

education.name: Education
education.description: Learning management and institutional administration systems.

financial.name: Financial Services
financial.description: Core banking, insurance, and financial operations platforms.

insurance.name: Insurance
insurance.description: Policy management, claims processing, and actuarial platforms.

telecom.name: Telecommunications
telecom.description: BSS/OSS, billing, and customer management platforms.
